title.en: And a lot of people aren't always making challe...

content.en:
After Ye Tian rested, he chose a group of Ten Thousand Things Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestors to challenge, but most of them refused, because they could see Ye Tian's record, although the number of battles was not much, but all of them were victories!

The half-step domain ancestor of the Ten Thousand Things Realm with a 100% victory rate, where would ordinary people dare to fight!

Therefore, Ye Tian found many challenges from the Ten Thousand Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestors, but none of them accepted, and only a few of the Ten Thousand Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestors would agree to learn from Ye Tian.

Of course, there are only a few half-step domain ancestors in the Ten Thousand Realm who are really here, most of the half-step domain ancestors in the Ten Thousand Things Realm are in retreat or outside the Battle Realm Tower, how can anyone always challenge here!

And a lot of people aren't always making challenges.

For example, there are some lists in the Battle Realm Tower, and there are three lists at the half-step domain ancestor level.

The Ordinary List, the Everything List, and the One List.

There are only 1,000 people on each list, and the number of people on this list is very small, but the strong people on each list are almost invincible existences of the same level, and each of them is a real peerless genius, and they can even kill enemies by leapfrogging.

Almost all of these geniuses came from the depths of the Dark Forbidden Realm, and it was difficult for such geniuses to be born in the realm.

These geniuses rarely enter the Battle Realm Tower, because they are almost invincible at the same level, who will come to the Battle Realm Tower to challenge?

Moreover, although the Battle Realm Tower is magical, it is not necessarily a great thing in the depths of the Dark Forbidden Domain, and the half-step domain ancestors do not necessarily have to come to the Battle Realm Tower.

Therefore, in the War Tower, the geniuses on these lists rarely appear, and if you want to challenge them, you can't find anyone.

Of course.

If they were replaced, perhaps they would enter the War Tower after the outside world knew about it.

And after Ye Tian challenged again and again, almost no one could win him, and the Battle Realm Tower actually ranked Ye Tian in the 987th place in the Battle Realm Tower's Everything List.

This is just a preliminary evaluation, no matter how strong Ye Tian's strength is, he has never defeated a genius on the list of all things, nor has he overstepped the level to defeat a half-step domain ancestor of the One Realm, so it is already an exaggeration to be able to rank such a high ranking!

When Ye Tian's name appeared on the list of the Ten Thousand Realms, it instantly attracted the attention of a large number of half-step domain ancestors.

"Ten Thousand Laws Dao Ancestor, who is this person, why did he suddenly enter the list of all things realm?"

"I don't know, I haven't heard of it!"

"I inquired clearly, it seems that the Battle Realm Tower has recently projected a sub-tower in a realm, and some half-step domain ancestors of that realm have come in, and this Ten Thousand Laws Dao Ancestor is the half-step domain ancestor of the Ten Thousand Realms of that realm!"

"It's impossible, a realm, and a backward realm that has just made contact with the depths of our dark forbidden realm, such a realm can also give birth to a genius who can enter the list of all things realm?"

"I don't want to believe it either, but that's what it is!"

"I checked his records, all of them were victories, and according to those defeated Ten Thousand Things Realm half-step domain ancestors, they were all killed in one move, and their strength was extremely terrifying, I am afraid that they have the combat power of the One Realm!"

"It is inevitable to have the combat power of the One Realm, to be able to enter the list of the Ten Thousand Realms, which one does not have the combat power of the One Realm? Many half-step domain ancestors of the Ten Thousand Things Realm who have the combat power of the One Realm have not been able to enter this list!"

......

There were a lot of people discussing Ye Tian, and for a while, the name of the Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestors was spread to the Battle Realm Tower.

And the Dao Mountain Realm and the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm are also remembered by many people, and there are very few realms that can be remembered by many half-step domain ancestors, and the Dao Mountain Realm is now one of them.

Abrupt.

A Returning One Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor appeared in front of Ye Tian.

This person's cultivation is very high, and he has already reached the Great Perfection Realm of the Unified Realm and the half-step Domain Ancestor level, and I am afraid that he is not far from the Domain Ancestor level.

Such a realm of unity can break through at any time and become a high-ranking domain ancestor.

Moreover, this is still a female Guiyi Realm half-step domain ancestor, wearing a purple battle armor to wrap her whole body, even with the aesthetics of the Daoshan realm, she is also a beauty.

"Wanfa Dao Ancestor, hello!"

This beautiful Dao Ancestor greeted Ye Tian.

"Who are you?"

Ye Tian asked deliberately.

In fact, by copying the talent, he already knew the name and title of this beauty, but he still had to ask.

"Mingyu Dao Ancestor!"

The beautiful Daozu introduced herself.

Ye Tian took a look at her talent and found that she had at least six or more forbidden talents, so he easily copied it.

In fact, there were no longer a few half-step domain ancestors with forbidden talents in the Battle Realm Tower, at least one percent.

Therefore, after he came to the Battle Realm Tower, he copied a large number of forbidden talents.

Once he left the Warworld Tower, he could fuse those countless forbidden talents.

At that time, his forbidden talent will be raised to an incomparably terrifying level.

At that time, he could easily create a Forbidden Dao Technique, and even easily cultivate the Forbidden Dao Technique to the extreme level.

"Mingyu Daozu, what are you looking for me?"

Ye Tian asked.

Mingyu Dao Ancestor asked, "Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestor, you shouldn't have joined any of the forces in the depths of the Dark Forbidden Domain, right?"

"Nope!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Hearing Ye Tian say no, Mingyu Dao Ancestor was a little pleased, and hurriedly said: "Wanfa Dao Ancestor, do you mind going to talk about it, I can tell you about the situation in the depths of the Dark Forbidden Domain, I'm afraid this is also the information you urgently need to know at the moment, the general half-step domain ancestor doesn't know much, and I come from a very large force, and the situation I know is definitely very comprehensive!"

"Okay!"

Ye Tian agreed.

Subsequently, Mingyu Daozu took Ye Tian into an independent space.

Before, Ye Tian had always only focused on the fighting platform, and he didn't understand the independent space at all.

Seeing that Ye Tian seemed a little confused, Mingyu Daozu introduced: "The Battle Boundary Tower is not such a big place, the Battle Boundary Tower still has a lot of independent space, and the major forces have spent a lot of points to buy independent space from the Battle Boundary Tower. The independent space can be used as a base for major forces, or it can be used as a shared area to run some businesses. For example, an independent space we are going to now is a shared independent space, which everyone can enter, and there are many cities in it, and each city has a large number of restaurants, cultivation places, and places of enlightenment, etc., and you can even exchange forbidden ways here. "

After the introduction of Mingyu Daozu, Ye Tian had a general understanding of the independent space.

Soon they came to a restaurant and sat down in a private room.
